who: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter
offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter, manual preparation causes delays in delivering financial statements. We simplify the preparation instead of manual preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual preparation of quarterly financial statements is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting professionals
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about accounting workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with a demo video
Share insights in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try template-based financial statement generation for free
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with a clear CTA
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Post weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing client data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps required during onboarding process
